reason: Contains ISIS terminology including 'Wilayat Sinai' (ولاية_سيناء), reference to 'apostates' (الردة), and uses ISIS communication style with news/updates format (#أخبار_الخلافة). Reports attack on Egyptian military in ISIS propaganda style.
